old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-kppd","title":"Separate TOFU pins from LRU peer cache","description":"Discovered during project-LICHEN-m5m1 review. lichen_app_identity stores TOFU-pinned keys in the same bounded table that silently evicts least-recently-updated peers. After eviction, the same EUI-64 can be rebound to a different key without explicit administrative removal, weakening spec 8.6 pinning. Define persistent/non-evictable trust-pin semantics separately from disposable discovery cache state.","acceptance_criteria":"1. A pinned EUI-64 cannot change keys through capacity eviction. 2. Key rotation requires explicit authorized removal/replacement. 3. Capacity pressure remains bounded and tested independently. 4. Persistence/reboot behavior is specified. 5. Three independent security review passes complete.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T00:30:47.502418Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T00:30:47.502418Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-kppd","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-m5m1.5","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-16T00:30:47.632092Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Implemented BLE secure mode negotiation with BT_SECURITY_L4 request and security_changed callback in ble_app_owner/ble_meshcore; separated TOFU pin table from LRU replay/peer cache in link_ctx/app_identity/meshcore with independent bounded pinned store, updated tests for eviction resistance and persistence; fixed per spec 8.6/11-lci; passed link_crypto, ble_ipsp_transport, meshcore_ble, meshtastic_ble, gateway tests, full west twister native_sim, cargo test/clippy; 3 security reviews complete
